categories.name: Foundations — app & document shells
categories.intro: The app and document shells most products start from — sidebars, top bars, split panes. Fork one of these when the structure should disappear behind the content.

categories.name: Spatial — navigate through space
categories.intro: Layouts where the interface is literally a space you move through — canvases, maps, floors, isometric scenes. Reach for these when "where am I" matters as much as what's on screen.

categories.name: Sequence & story — the axis is the nav
categories.intro: Layouts where moving through content in order, start to finish, is the whole point — timelines, filmstrips, page-turns. Fork one when the content is a story, not a menu.

categories.name: Command & conversation — type, don't click
categories.intro: Interfaces you drive by typing or talking instead of clicking — command palettes, terminals, chat, voice. Fork one when the fastest way in is a keyboard or a microphone.

categories.name: Objects & cards — the content is a thing
categories.intro: Layouts that treat each piece of content as a physical thing — cards, decks, boards, a departure display. Reach for these when items should feel handled, not just listed.

categories.name: Immersive — cinematic
categories.intro: Full-bleed, cinematic layouts built to hold attention — flythroughs, spotlights, posters. Fork one for a launch page or a moment that should feel like a scene, not a form.

categories.name: Slides & frames — presentation layouts
categories.intro: 16:9 presentation frames — a KPI slide, a quadrant matrix, a roadmap lane. These are layout mechanics for a deck, not a chart; reach for one when the deliverable is something someone will present.

categories.name: Agentic commerce — chat that buys
categories.intro: Chat surfaces built around an agent that can actually buy things — shopping chat, checkout journeys, approval queues. Fork one when the product is commerce conducted in conversation.

categories.name: Comparison — set side by side
categories.intro: Charts that set two or more things side by side so the gap is the message. Reach for these when someone asks "which is bigger, and by how much?"

categories.name: Trend / Time-series — the shape of change
categories.intro: Charts about the shape of change over time — a line with a confidence band, a streamgraph, a bump chart of ranks. Reach for these when the question is how something got here.

categories.name: Part-to-whole — composition
categories.intro: Charts that break one total into its named pieces — a waffle grid, a treemap, a stacked bar with leader labels. Reach for these when the whole matters as much as any single part.

categories.name: Distribution — the shape of the data
categories.intro: Charts that show the spread and shape of many values, not just their average — histograms, ridgelines, beeswarms. Reach for these when the outliers are the story, not the mean.

categories.name: Correlation — how two things move
categories.intro: Charts that show how two or more measures move together — a scatter with a trendline, a bubble quadrant, a connected scatter. Reach for these when the relationship matters more than either metric alone.

categories.name: Ranking — order matters
categories.intro: Charts built to put things in order, best to worst — ordered bars, a lollipop against a benchmark, a league table. Reach for these when "where do we stand" is the whole question.

categories.name: Flow & process — where things go
categories.intro: Charts that trace where something moves or drops off — a sankey, a funnel, a chord diagram. Reach for these when the path between stages matters more than any single stage.

categories.name: Hierarchy & network — structure
categories.intro: Charts for structure — a radial tree, a network graph, an icicle partition. Reach for these when the data has parents, children, or connections worth drawing.

categories.name: Table & heatmap — dense and exact
categories.intro: Dense, exact views for reading many values at once — a calendar heatmap, a matrix with marginal totals, a sparkline table. Reach for these when a reader needs the precise number, not just the shape.

categories.name: Geospatial — where
categories.intro: Charts that put data on a map or a map-like grid — a tile cartogram, a symbol map, a flow map of arcs. Reach for these when where something happens is the insight.

categories.name: Pictorial — data made human
categories.intro: Charts that make a number feel human — an icon array, proportional shapes, a big-number lead. Reach for these when a reader should feel a rate, not just read it.

categories.name: Dashboard & multi-chart — the whole picture
categories.intro: Multi-chart views built for a recurring review — a KPI wall, small multiples, a narrative dashboard with annotations. Reach for these when one chart alone can't carry the whole update.

items.title: Split Panel
items.oneliner: Nav in a fixed identity panel; content scrolls beside it.

items.title: Centered Document
items.oneliner: Sticky top bar + in-page anchors; centered column.

items.title: Sidebar App Shell
items.oneliner: Persistent sidebar + topbar; the app workhorse.

items.title: Three-Pane
items.oneliner: Rail → list → detail; master/detail data.

items.title: Bento Grid
items.oneliner: Modular tiles of mixed sizes are the homepage.

items.title: Accordion Spine
items.oneliner: Expand one section in place; others collapse.

items.title: Bottom-Sheet
items.oneliner: Draggable sheet over a map; snaps peek/half/full.

items.title: Tabbed Workspace
items.oneliner: Switch tabs — browser-style; close, add, drag to reorder.

items.title: Mobile Tab-Bar Shell
items.oneliner: Bottom tabs — tap or swipe between four sections.

items.title: Infinite Canvas
items.oneliner: Pan + zoom a plane of nodes; semantic zoom.

items.title: Zettelkasten Panes
items.oneliner: Links open as new sliding columns; the trail stays.

items.title: Radial Orbit
items.oneliner: Peers orbit a hub; click to rotate one to the top.

items.title: Map-Pinned
items.oneliner: Content at coordinates; click a pin for its brief.

items.title: Elevator Floors
items.oneliner: Ride between floors via an elevator panel.

items.title: Arrow Rooms
items.oneliner: Walk a 2D grid of rooms with arrow keys.

items.title: Folder Column-View
items.oneliner: Drill into columns — selecting cascades children to the right.

items.title: Isometric Scene
items.oneliner: Travel a 2.5D plane — click a zone; arrow keys move focus.

items.title: Mind-Map Tree
items.oneliner: Expand branches — click a node to grow its children.

items.title: Globe (3D Points)
items.oneliner: Drag to spin a point globe; click a dot to open its brief.

items.title: Scrollytelling
items.oneliner: Scroll-driven full-bleed scenes + progress dots.

items.title: Timeline Scrubber
items.oneliner: A draggable time axis reveals events as you scrub.

items.title: Horizontal Filmstrip
items.oneliner: Sideways snap between full-height panels.

items.title: Sticky-Stack Chapters
items.oneliner: Chapters pin and stack over each other on scroll.

items.title: Dial / Wheel Picker
items.oneliner: Spin a wheel — drag or scroll; the centred item is selected.

items.title: Stepper / Wizard
items.oneliner: Advance steps — a progress rail; jump back to done steps.

items.title: Page-Turn Book
items.oneliner: Flip pages — click an edge or arrows; spreads fold over.

items.title: Story Tap-Through
items.oneliner: Tap to advance — timed segments; hold to pause.

items.title: Carousel / Slideshow
items.oneliner: Page slides — arrows, dots, autoplay that pauses on hover.

items.title: Command-Palette-First
items.oneliner: A ⌘K palette is the primary way to move.

items.title: Terminal / CLI
items.oneliner: The site is a command line; output scrolls.

items.title: Chat-First
items.oneliner: Ask, and content blocks render inline.

items.title: Conversational Form
items.oneliner: One question at a time — Enter advances; progress fills.

items.title: Notebook / REPL Cells
items.oneliner: Run a cell — ⇧⏎ renders output below; add cells.

items.title: Keyboard Inbox
items.oneliner: j / k / Enter / e — drive a list entirely by keys.

items.title: Slash-Command Editor
items.oneliner: Type / to summon a block menu inline.

items.title: Live Filter Search
items.oneliner: Search as you type — facet chips filter instantly.

items.title: Voice Assistant
items.oneliner: Tap the mic — query transcribes, then an answer card.

items.title: Desktop OS
items.oneliner: Draggable windows from a dock; a site as an OS.

items.title: Card-Deck Swipe
items.oneliner: Flick through a stack; the top card is focus.

items.title: Pinboard Wall
items.oneliner: Pinned notes at angles; scan, lift, open.

items.title: Split-Flap Board
items.oneliner: A departure board; filters re-flip the rows.

items.title: Cover Flow
items.oneliner: 3D carousel; side cards angle back in perspective.

items.title: Kanban Board
items.oneliner: Drag cards across To-do / Doing / Done columns.

items.title: Masonry Gallery
items.oneliner: Staggered grid → click a tile to open a lightbox.

items.title: Card Wallet
items.oneliner: Tap a pass to raise it, tap again to flip for detail.

items.title: Data Table
items.oneliner: Sort columns, click a row for a detail drawer.

items.title: Ticker / Stock-Board
items.oneliner: Values tick live — a marquee runs above; click a row for its sparkline.

items.title: Z-Axis Fly-Through
items.oneliner: Scroll = camera moving forward through depth.

items.title: Grid-to-Detail Morph
items.oneliner: A tile expands in place into a full page.

items.title: Poster / Full-Bleed
items.oneliner: Vertical snap between full-screen posters.

items.title: Marquee Index
items.oneliner: Auto-scrolling type rows; hover pauses, click opens.

items.title: Spotlight Scroll
items.oneliner: A spotlight follows the cursor; the rest goes dark.

items.title: Parallax Mouse Hero
items.oneliner: Layers shift with the cursor — depth that follows your mouse.

items.title: Diagonal / Skewed Editorial
items.oneliner: Skewed sections + rotated type reveal on scroll.

items.title: Particle Starfield Hero
items.oneliner: Animated star field drifts behind bold type.

items.title: Cursor-Mask Reveal
items.oneliner: A mask follows the cursor, revealing a different layer beneath.

items.title: KPI Big-Number Slide
items.oneliner: One number leads — arrows cycle variants; the stat counts up, bars re-fill.

items.title: Numbered-Steps Slide
items.oneliner: 1-2-3 highlight — click a step or arrow along; the caption swaps.

items.title: 2×2 Quadrant Matrix
items.oneliner: Four quadrants — hover a dot for its note; click a quadrant to focus it.

items.title: Versus / Comparison Slide
items.oneliner: Drag the divider — A-vs-B rows stay aligned; double-click resets 50/50.

items.title: Roadmap / Timeline Slide
items.oneliner: Click a phase to zoom — Now / Next / Later lanes re-flow around it.

items.title: Title + Section-Divider System
items.oneliner: Page a mini deck — cover, dividers, closing; arrows, dots, edge-click.

items.title: Mobile Shopping Chat
items.oneliner: Chat to shop — assistant replies with product cards you add to a cart.

items.title: Agentic Checkout Journey
items.oneliner: Step deck through a buy flow — arrows, keys, progress.

items.title: Streaming Agent Trace
items.oneliner: Watch the agent work — reasoning + tool calls, then the answer.

items.title: Multi-Agent Handoff
items.oneliner: Agents hand off — shopper → payments → fulfilment.

items.title: ChatGPT Agentic Commerce
items.oneliner: Research → buy in chat — buyer's guide, then inline checkout.

items.title: ChatGPT Mobile Commerce
items.oneliner: Buy in the chat — mobile ChatGPT; checkout slides up as a sheet.

items.title: Chat + Live Product Canvas
items.oneliner: Chat drives a canvas — each agent reply lands product tiles; hover a message to see its tiles.

items.title: Human-in-the-Loop Approvals
items.oneliner: Approve the agent — proposals queue up; you approve, edit, or reject each.

items.title: Comparison-in-Chat
items.oneliner: Mentions become columns — chat grows a comparison tray; toggle diffs, pick a winner.

items.title: Grouped Bars with Annotation
items.oneliner: Two-series category comparisons; plan vs actual.
items.when: two-series category comparisons; plan vs actual

items.title: Slope Chart
items.oneliner: Before/after across many entities; rank shifts.
items.when: before/after across many entities; rank shifts

items.title: Dumbbell / Dot-Range
items.oneliner: Gap analysis; before/after by group.

items.title: Line with Confidence Band + Events
items.oneliner: KPIs with uncertainty, forecasts, experiments.

items.title: Streamgraph
items.oneliner: Evolving share of voice/volume.

items.title: Bump Chart
items.oneliner: League positions, brand rankings over time.
items.when: league positions, brand rankings over time

items.title: Waffle Grid
items.oneliner: Shares of a population, survey splits.
items.when: shares of a population, survey splits

items.title: Treemap
items.oneliner: Budgets, portfolio weights, storage.

items.title: Stacked Bar with Leader Labels
items.oneliner: Single-total breakdowns where each part deserves a sentence.
items.when: single-total breakdowns where each part deserves a sentence

items.title: Histogram with Summary Stats
items.oneliner: Response times, prices, scores.

items.title: Ridgeline
items.oneliner: Distributions across groups / time-of-day.

items.title: Beeswarm / Dot Strip
items.oneliner: Small-n distributions where individual points matter.
items.when: small-n distributions where individual points matter

items.title: Annotated Scatter with Trendline
items.oneliner: Two-metric relationships with exceptions worth naming.
items.when: two-metric relationships with exceptions worth naming

items.title: Bubble Quadrant
items.oneliner: Effort/impact, risk/return, growth/share.

items.title: Connected Scatter
items.oneliner: Two metrics evolving together over time.
items.when: two metrics evolving together over time

items.title: Ordered Bars with Highlight
items.oneliner: "where do we stand" rankings.

items.title: Lollipop with Benchmark
items.oneliner: Targets, SLAs, peer medians.

items.title: League Table with Deltas
items.oneliner: Leaderboards, portfolio tables, team metrics.

items.title: Sankey
items.oneliner: Traffic sources → outcomes, budget flows, energy.

items.title: Funnel
items.oneliner: Signup/checkout funnels, pipeline stages.

items.title: Chord Diagram
items.oneliner: Migrations, trade, who-talks-to-whom.

items.title: Radial Tree
items.oneliner: Org/topic structures with a focal branch.

items.title: Network Graph
items.oneliner: Collaboration, dependencies, influence maps.

items.title: Icicle / Partition
items.oneliner: File sizes, budget trees, taxonomy weights.
items.when: file sizes, budget trees, taxonomy weights

items.title: Calendar Heatmap
items.oneliner: Activity rhythms, habit/commit data.

items.title: Matrix Heatmap with Marginals
items.oneliner: Confusion matrices, region×product, time×channel.

items.title: Sparkline Table
items.oneliner: Metric overviews, watchlists.

items.title: Tile-Grid Cartogram
items.oneliner: Per-region rates where area shouldn’t dominate.

items.title: Proportional Symbol Map
items.oneliner: Quantities at places (sales by city, outbreaks).
items.when: quantities at places (sales by city, outbreaks)

items.oneliner: Shipments, migration, network traffic.

items.oneliner: Magnitude gaps too big for bars.
